docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $230.00 FILED BY KOUAME, ANDRE DBA ANOUMAN & CARPET CLEANING AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, WILLIAMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO WILLIAM MILLER RETURNED SIGNED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY MILLER, WILLIAMS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KOUAME, ANDRE DBA ANOUMAN & CARPET CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOUAME, ANDRE DBA ANOUMAN & CARPET CLEANING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MILLER, WILLIAMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MILLER, WILLIAMS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT KOUAME, ANDRE DBA ANOUMAN & CARPET CLEANING $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $265.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
